prompt: Design system update: accent color changed from blue to purple. Need 3 variants of existing card component to show stakeholders. Which creative range?
expected_output: Skill recommends EXPLORE range (moderate changes) for color variants. Shows generate_variants call with COLOR_SCHEME aspect. Produces 3 screenshots at different purple intensities. Skill explains: REFINE for fine-tuning (opacity tweak), EXPLORE for palette alternatives, REIMAGINE for radically different approaches.
